message:
feat(indexer): resumable lexical rebuild and historical salvage with durable checkpoints

Makes long-running index and historical salvage operations crash-safe
and resumable. Lexical rebuild introduces LexicalRebuildState serialized
to .lexical-rebuild-state.json with schema-hash+DB-path keying and
two-phase pending/finalize commit bracketing. Historical salvage adds
HistoricalBundleProgress checkpoints in the meta table keyed by blake3
hash of the bundle path. Acquires an exclusive fs2 advisory lock at
the top of run_index to prevent concurrent corruption. Adds recursive
batch-splitting retry for OOM and too-many-variables errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,6 +36,7 @@ frankensqlite = { path = "../frankensqlite/crates/fsqlite", package = "fsqlite",
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
+fs2 = "*"
 lru = "0.16"
 rustc-hash = "*"  # Fast non-cryptographic hashing for cache keys (P1 Opt 1.3), replaces unmaintained fxhash
 smallvec = "*"  # Stack-allocated small vectors for hot paths (Opt 4.4)
